'''chasotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicastrin|nicastrin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-s-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicastrin|nicastrin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chasotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæsetheth|chæsetheth]] || [[word:chæsethej|chæsethej]] || [[word:chæsethesh|chæsethesh]] || [[word:chæsethe|chæsethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chasosothoth|chasosothoth]] || [[word:chasosothoj|chasosothoj]] || [[word:chasosothosh|chasosothosh]] || [[word:chasosotho|chasosotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chasothoth|chasothoth]] || [[word:chasothoj|chasothoj]] || [[word:chasothosh|chasothosh]] || [[word:chasotho|chasotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chasofthoth|chasofthoth]] || [[word:chasofthoj|chasofthoj]] || [[word:chasofthosh|chasofthosh]] || [[word:chasofthof|chasofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chasothotho|chasothotho]] || [[word:chasothojo|chasothojo]] || [[word:chasothosho|chasothosho]] || [[word:chasothoko|chasothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chasothoth|chasothoth]] || [[word:chasothoj|chasothoj]] || [[word:chasothosh|chasothosh]] || [[word:chasotho|chasotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chasothothol|chasothothol]] || [[word:chasothojol|chasothojol]] || [[word:chasothoshol|chasothoshol]] || [[word:chasothokol|chasothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chasothothotho|chasothothotho]] || [[word:chasothojojo|chasothojojo]] || [[word:chasothoshosho|chasothoshosho]] || [[word:chasothoko|chasothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chasothothon|chasothothon]] || [[word:chasothojon|chasothojon]] || [[word:chasothoshon|chasothoshon]] || [[word:chasothokon|chasothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chasothothoro|chasothothoro]] || [[word:chasothojoro|chasothojoro]] || [[word:chasothoshoro|chasothoshoro]] || [[word:chasothokoro|chasothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
